scenario.context: Station 08 of the day run: document components and interfaces.
scenario.mission: You create maintainable interface documentation and derive concrete improvements from the project history.

customerRequest.subject: Station 08: Documentation and project close
customerRequest.body: Please deliver clear interface documentation including error cases and a short closing reflection.

questions.title: Documentation basics
questions.prompt: Which detail is indispensable for interface documentation?

options.rationale: The core of every interface definition.
Not clear enough for other teams.

feedback.correct: Correct: These details are mandatory for usable documentation.
feedback.wrong: Not suitable: Documentation needs input/output details and error behavior.

questions.title: Maintainable documentation
questions.prompt: Which points make documentation maintainable? (Multiple choice)

options.text: Provide examples of valid and invalid requests
Distribute documentation only as a chat message

feedback.wrong: Partly wrong: Please secure versioning, examples, and error references more strongly.

questions.title: Documentation process
questions.prompt: Put the flow from the interface to the final documentation in order.
items: Describe inputs, outputs, and error cases
correctOrder: Describe inputs, outputs, and error cases

feedback.correct: Correct: The documentation process is structured cleanly.
feedback.wrong: Not ideal: Please finish scope and content first, then versioning and approval.

questions.title: Documentation effort
questions.prompt: Documentation of 18 minutes is planned for each of 6 endpoints. Another 24 minutes are added for review. How many minutes in total?

feedback.wrong: Please add endpoint effort and review correctly.

questions.title: LF11 closing reflection
questions.prompt: Formulate a reflection in 4-6 sentences with documentation quality, an open point, and an improvement step.
questions.expectedOutline: Reflection on documentation quality, remaining point, and concrete improvement.

feedback.correct: Correct: The reflection is clear and action-oriented.
feedback.wrong: Please develop documentation quality, the open point, and the improvement more clearly.
